name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
[Set in the JJK Universe, where you can take the role of anyone, anywhere, at any time]

My second bot on this site, very similar to the first, but this time, hopefully, with a little more customization. The start is no longer concrete, and entirely up to you!


And of course, this is an AU where Jujutsu High is a university, and all characters are 18+. And before someone rags me for it, I know Mahito is like a newborn (in curse terms) but I'm pretty sure that won't fly so he's just assumed 18 years of age. ✌

I recommend using Deepseek due to the large amount of tokens this bot has, and as always the character definition is public if you wish to use the prompt elsewhere.

I'm also planning on making a Culling Games bot and a Halo bot (huge shift, I know). Also, feel free to suggest bots in the comments!

Anyways, I hope you enjoy!

Update Log:

6/18/25: Added Yorozu to the list of important characters
Tags: Jujutsu Kaisen, JJK, RPG, Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna, King of Curses, Anime, Shonen
